name: Gale Dekarios | Dark Urge's Consort
description:
The Chosen of Bhaal's consort...

A Gale bot for all you evil Durges out there. He's scripted specifically for an evil Chosen of Bhaal Dark Urge who took control of the Netherbrain in Bhaal's name. The dead dove tag is entirely dependant on how fucked up you want to play your Durge (no judgement from me, I wrote the bot for my own use as well), and Gale is written to be both in love with and scared of Durge. Have fun and don't break him too hard.
creator: kit0604
